betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Mustard Willow§f

§aCultivate this alien-looking plant to produce cadmium — a vital alloying element!§f

The §bMustard Willow§f is a plant that grows near bedrock oil deposits. Its leaves can be harvested and processed into cadmium, which is mainly useful for making cadmium steel — a substitute for technetium steel.

§6Growth Requirements§f:
§b• Water§f — adjacent to the block below the plant (otherwise it won't grow at all)
§b• Dead or Oily Dirt§f — plant must be on top of polluted soil to fully mature and drop leaves
§b• No light required§f — grows in complete darkness

§6Growth Stages§f (5 total):
§b• Stage 2§f — needs §e1 extra block§f of space above to continue
§b• Stage 4§f — consumes the dead/oily dirt underneath to mature
§b• Stage 5§f — fully red and matured, top part yields §e3–6§f leaves + §e1§f plant item

§6Automation§f: The plant can be harvested automatically with an §bAutomatic Buzz Saw§f, allowing the entire lifecycle to be fully automated. A §bFracking Tower§f continuously pollutes the ground, keeping mustard willow supplied with oily dirt.

§6Processing§f:
§b• Leaves§f → acidize with §e250 mB High-Performance Solvent§f in Ore Acidizer = §e1 Cadmium Powder§f per 10 leaves
§b• Plant§f → liquifact in Industrial Liquefaction Machine = §e50 mB Ethanol§f

§eTip§f: Check the in-game guide by hovering over the plant and pressing §bLSHIFT+F1§f!
